arts.ttl: Inter’s Midfield Reshuffle: Asllani and Zielinski to Join Barella Against Venezia
arts.sum: Inter Milan face a significant midfield challenge as they prepare to kick off their 2025 Serie A campaign against Venezia on Sunday. While the flanks will feature the familiar duo of Denzel Dumfries and Federico Dimarco, the heart of Inter's formation will showcase an unprecedented combination. arts.ttl: Manchester United and Leicester City Set Sights on Inter Milan’s Rising Star Francesco Pio Esposito
arts.sum: Francesco Pio Esposito, the youngest of the talented Esposito brothers, has been making waves in Italian football with his exceptional performances. The 19-year-old striker, currently on loan at Spezia from Inter Milan, has caught the attention of two prominent English clubs: Manchester United and Leicester City. arts.ttl: Serie A | Venezia v Inter: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season continues, reigning champions Inter Milan will look to bounce back from their recent Supercoppa Italiana defeat when they face Venezia on Sunday at the Stadio Pier Luigi Penzo. This match presents an opportunity for Inter to reaffirm their dominance in the league after a disappointing loss to their city rivals, AC Milan. The post Serie A | Venezia v Inter: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Roma Set Sights on Inter’s Tajon Buchanan Amid Transfer Speculation
arts.sum: Inter Milan find themselves at the centre of transfer speculation as Roma express interest in acquiring Tajon Buchanan. The Canadian winger, who joined Inter from Club Brugge last year for €7.3 million, has become a notable target for the Giallorossi as they look to bolster their squad.
